mainLocation.placeName: CARREFOUR SODECI, Yopougon, Abidjan, Ivory Coast

content: our first international conference this year will be held in Abidjan, Ivory coast.
Bishop Jean Baptiste is the host and has sent out the invitation letters above👆.
Bishops Paul, Lars and Efrem among others will be attending.
All others who wish to join are welcome!
